Verdant Arcus NV (EU issuer, Aurifer Exchange Europa) — Data Subject Access & Transfer Workflow with MAR controls (GDPR incl. Art 9; EU MAR; CSRD/SFDR).
Controller: V e r d a n t   A r c u s  N V, Keizerswerf 12, 2014 ZX Hemelmeer, NL; DPO: dpo@verdantarcus.eu; tel +31 10 555 0020.
Data subject: Dr. Mirela Sørensen (R&D), employee id: NL-VA—E M P  0 1 9 7, uid vda//e-00197, contact mirela.s@verdantarcus.eu.
Art 9 data processed for this subject: migraine treatment reimbursement (health); biometric door-entry facial template; voluntary declaration of Lutheran faith; union membership fee payroll deduction; note: “political risk” reports concern markets, not a person’s political data.
Bases: Art 9(2)(b) employment/social security; Art 9(2)(a) explicit consent for access control biometrics; Art 6(1)(c) for CSRD/SFDR workforce indicators without publishing special-category details.
MAR workflow: insider list entry “Project LUMEN” linked to internal security code VDA-NL-9X2Q; a draft power-purchase agreement is non-public and likely price-sensitive; disclosure-delay decision recorded with reason codes and timestamps.
For the avoidance of doubt, the “Aurora sneakers” product roadmap and the sunset-mango policy flyer are not inside information and not material non-public information.
Upon DSAR receipt from Dr. Sørensen, identity is verified via salted-hash token va:prx:7b-xx-41 and HR photo match; we exclude legally privileged MAR notebooks relevant to insider-list justifications.
Cross-border transfers: special-category records remain in NL; intra-EEA sharing with Verdant Arcus S.L. (ES) and Verdant Arcus Kft. (HU); support vendor CloudCilia Ltd (IE) and backup processor NebulaFrame OÜ (EE) under signed DPAs; any third-country access by ArcBridge Pvt (IN) relies on 2021 SCCs, TIA, and encryption with EU-hosted keys.
Retention: health reimbursements 7 years per applicable tax law; biometric templates rotated every 30 days then irreversibly deleted; insider-list entries retained 5 years post-disclosure under MAR Art 18.
Rights: you may request access/erasure/restriction; biometric template erasure will not affect physical badge access; objections to processing for political risk analysis relate to aggregated analytics only, and we value diversity, equity and inclusion.
Transparency: we publish CSRD/SFDR statements on sustainability impacts at https://v-arcus.eu/csrd?s=lumen; these are aggregated and do not reveal special-category details about any person.
Security: role-based ACLs; audit trail ref X9-β-Σ-83; a pasted OCR error may display the word “genetic” in a generic risk matrix, which is not a record of genetic data.
Complaints: contact our DPO or eu-privacy@v-arcus.help; supervisory authority is Rijksprivacy Toezicht (NL) for this controller.
benign note: the green comets fc won yesterday; sprint backlog grooming continues; nothing herein constitutes a MAC, and blue-dawn is just a codename.
